I have to find my gate.
I have to show my boarding pass at the gate.
You need to arrive two hours early.

Do I have to check this bag?
Good afternoon. May I see your passport, please? Do you want a window seat or an aisle seat?
Here it is. A window seat, please. Do I have to check this bag?
The big one, yes. But you do not have to pay for it. You can put the small bag in the overhead bin.
Perfect. I have a connecting flight in Madrid. Do I have to collect my bag there?
No, you do not. It is a short layover, so you only need to wait at the gate in the terminal.
Great. So I have to listen for my boarding group and keep my boarding pass ready. Thank you!

Good afternoon, passengers. This is the final boarding call for flight 472 to Lisbon, now boarding at the gate in Terminal 2. We are boarding by groups, so please listen for your boarding group. Passengers with priority boarding may board first. If you have a large bag, you have to place it in the overhead bin above your seat. You do not need to show your passport again at this gate, but you have to have your boarding pass ready. Passengers with a connecting flight do not have to collect their luggage here. Thank you, and have a pleasant flight.

I arrived at the airport early because I had to check in two hours before my flight. At the counter, the agent asked me if I wanted a window seat or an aisle seat, and I chose the window seat. She told me I had to put my big bag in the hold, but I did not have to pay for it. My trip has a layover in Madrid, so I have a connecting flight. I do not have to leave the terminal there. I only have to wait at the gate for my boarding group. I am in group three, so I need to be patient and wait for my turn.

First, Roberto has to arrive at the airport early and go to the check-in counter. Then he has to choose a window seat or an aisle seat. Next, he needs to put his big bag in the hold and keep his boarding pass ready. After that, he has to wait at the gate in the terminal for his boarding group. Finally, he needs to put his small bag in the overhead bin and find his seat on the plane.
